description: STEPPER modeled as Lock
DEP_CHAMBER modeled as Lock
ETCH_CHAMBER modeled as Lock
METROLOGY_STATION modeled as Lock
MONITOR modeled as Lock
wafer_slots modeled as Counter (initial=2)
channel from LITHOGRAPHER to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for pattern_ready
channel from DEPOSITOR to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for film_ready
channel from ETCHER to METROLOGY_ENGINEER for etch_ready
channel from METROLOGY_ENGINEER to PROCESS_CONTROLLER for measurement reports
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to LITHOGRAPHER for validation/halt/clearance
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to DEPOSITOR for validation/halt/clearance
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to ETCHER for validation/halt/clearance
channel from PROCESS_CONTROLLER to INTEGRATION_ENGINEER for all_validated
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to LITHOGRAPHER for lot_disposition
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to DEPOSITOR for lot_disposition
channel from INTEGRATION_ENGINEER to ETCHER for lot_disposition
channel from METROLOGY_ENGINEER to LITHOGRAPHER for rework notification
channel from METROLOGY_ENGINEER to DEPOSITOR for rework notification
channel from METROLOGY_ENGINEER to ETCHER for rework notification
metrology measurement can pass or fail, triggering rework
PROCESS_CONTROLLER can issue a yield halt or proceed normally
METROLOGY_ENGINEER measures only after receiving process-ready notifications
PROCESS_CONTROLLER validates only after receiving all three measurement reports
fab agents enter Phase 2 only after receiving validation
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER begins only after receiving all_validated
fab agents finish only after receiving lot_disposition
run_stepper_exposure requires holding STEPPER
run_deposition requires holding DEP_CHAMBER
run_etch_process requires holding ETCH_CHAMBER
run_metrology_measurement requires holding METROLOGY_STATION
check_monitoring requires holding MONITOR
3-way circular: LITHOGRAPHER(STEPPER->ETCH_CHAMBER) + ETCHER(ETCH_CHAMBER->DEP_CHAMBER) + DEPOSITOR(DEP_CHAMBER->STEPPER)
2-way circular: LITHOGRAPHER(STEPPER->metrology) + DEPOSITOR(metrology->STEPPER)
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER acquires DEP_CHAMBER + ETCH_CHAMBER + STEPPER atomically — deadlock if any fab agent holds one
yield halt: PROCESS_CONTROLLER acquires MONITOR + METROLOGY_STATION, broadcasts halt — all fab agents must release and wait
rework loops cost wafer_slot units — counter exhaustion (wafer_slots=2) limits concurrent rework
LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, ETCHER all do hold-and-wait for MONITOR during Phase 1
rework requires re-acquiring wafer_slot + instrument — competing with active fab processes
METROLOGY_ENGINEER receives from fab agents in any order
PROCESS_CONTROLLER receives reports in any order
PROCESS_CONTROLLER broadcasts validations/halt/clearance
INTEGRATION_ENGINEER broadcasts lot_disposition
LITHOGRAPHER, DEPOSITOR, and ETCHER perform Phase 1 concurrently
